title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
